## [00:00 - 02:08]

Alright everybody, welcome to Module 7. I really hope you enjoyed your time with Mike. I would like to introduce another dear friend of mine, Mr. Tom Breeze is a YouTube Ads expert. He also owns an agency in the UK called Viewability. He has a book called Viewability on Amazon and also does trainings to help people like you with YouTube ads. So just as Mike did, Tom is going to teach you a completely different traffic platform that will allow you to scale and broaden your media buying expertise. Welcome to the YouTube advertising training. I am Tom Breeze and I'm going to be walking you through the next few videos to show you how to really master YouTube advertising for your business so you can drive more leads, more sales and make a lot more profit with your advertising campaigns. Now this training is going to be broken down into four different sections. First of all, we're going to be talking about your customers' moment. This is really kind of like an underpinning of YouTube advertising and how to get in front of your customers when they're potentially looking for what it is that you've got to offer. Understanding their moments is critical to that process. Then we're going to go to understand how to create the perfect video ad so when you do get in front of your customers, you make sure you have the right ad and the right offer for them. Then we're going to go through how to reach your customer in their moment of need so make sure we actually can get in front of those customers and know how to do that. And then finally what I'm going to do is I'm going to do a complete walkthrough of how to set up your account, how to make sure you have your ads running and what sort of targeting to put into place so you know you can drive your ads, get in front of the right person at the right time with the right offer so you can turn $1 into more than $1. Because when you can do that, when you can drive a profit with your advertising and you can scale that process, you'll find that YouTube advertising is probably the most exciting place to be when it comes to advertising. All right, let's go on with the training.
